creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to mikael.urankar from comment #16)
Mikael, thanks for your tests.  

I'll leave this bug report open for now since we don't yet have a solution for db5 on FreeBSD 9 or 10 on ARM v6 or newer/AARCH64 - if we find one, we'll consider it, otherwise this PR will be closed when 10.3 goes out of support in May 2018 as "overcome by events".
